name: nijenhuis-boat-rental
description: Modern boat rental website for Nijenhuis in the Weerribben nature reserve

scripts.minify: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.minify:css: npx cleancss -o frontend/css/styles.min.css frontend/css/styles.css && npx cleancss -o frontend/css/pages/boats.min.css frontend/css/pages/boats.css && npx cleancss -o frontend/css/pages/destination-pages.min.css frontend/css/pages/destination-pages.css && npx cleancss -o frontend/css/pages/vaarkaart.min.css frontend/css/pages/vaarkaart.css && npx cleancss -o frontend/css/pages/booking.min.css frontend/css/pages/booking.css && npx cleancss -o frontend/css/pages/home.min.css frontend/css/pages/home.css && npx cleancss -o frontend/css/pages/faq.min.css frontend/css/pages/faq.css && npx cleancss -o js/booking-system.min.css js/booking-system.css && npx cleancss -o pages/pages-consolidated.min.css pages/pages-consolidated.css
scripts.minify:js: npx terser mollie_api.js -o mollie_api.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/core/security.js -o frontend/src/js/core/security.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/core/shared.js -o frontend/src/js/core/shared.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/core/translation-core.js -o frontend/src/js/core/translation-core.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/booking/mollie-payment.js -o frontend/src/js/booking/mollie-payment.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/booking/cart.js -o frontend/src/js/booking/cart.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/hooks/useBoatData.js -o frontend/src/js/hooks/useBoatData.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/hooks/useBookingAvailability.js -o frontend/src/js/hooks/useBookingAvailability.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/pages/home.js -o frontend/src/js/pages/home.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/pages/booking.js -o frontend/src/js/pages/booking.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/pages/boats.js -o frontend/src/js/pages/boats.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/pages/te-koop.js -o frontend/src/js/pages/te-koop.min.js -c -m && npx terser frontend/src/js/pages/faq-prices.js -o frontend/src/js/pages/faq-prices.min.js -c -m && npx terser js/boat-data-service.js -o js/boat-data-service.min.js -c -m && npx terser js/for-sale-data-service.js -o js/for-sale-data-service.min.js -c -m
scripts.audit: npm audit && cd frontend && npm audit
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install

pwa.name: Nijenhuis Boat Rental
pwa.description: Boat rental in Weerribben nature reserve
